name: Chicken and Mushroom Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the mushrooms, cutting them in half.
2. In a large casserole dish, combine the chicken, mushrooms, whole garlic cloves, white wine, and Italian dressing.
3. Cover and refrigerate overnight to marinate.
4. Remove the chicken and mushrooms from the marinade and set aside 2 cups of it.
5. Pour the remaining marinade into another container.
6. Return the chicken and mushrooms to the casserole dish.
7. Mix the 2 cups of marinade with the cans of gravy.
8. Pour this mixture over the chicken.
9. Bake at 325°F for 1 1/2 hours.
10. Serve hot over rice, potatoes, or biscuits.
Note: The remaining marinade can be frozen for later use as a marinade for barbecue.
